通过新增的正向体验样本，不断调低「跳舞会出丑」的后验概率，逐步修正原有的错误锚定，改变认知判断

The original depression state is a self-reinforcing positive feedback of "self-rumination → energy internal consumption → self-loathing → deeper rumination". This strategy establishes a new self-reinforcing positive feedback of "small altruism → increased sense of value → reduced rumination → more positive output" to maintain the stability of the new steady state
